gui.intel_corrupted_microcode_good: Your BIOS/UEFI is up to date. If you still get crashes outside Minecraft, check your warranty options. (Your microcode version is $MICROCODE_VERSION_CURRENT$, which satisfies the minimum recommended version $MICROCODE_VERSION_FIXED$.)
warnings.mixin_apply_missing_class: Some mod is missing another mod it depends on. Missing class: $MISSING_CLASS$ To fix, do one of the following: 1) Press the button below and use the window to figure out the mod name. Then find the listing of the mod and read its description to find out the requirements. 2) Press the button below, use the window and take a screenshot for it. Then return to main crash window, follow instructions and attach the screenshot, so that we can help you solve the issue.
warnings.mixin_apply_conflicting: Mod $MOD$ likely cannot be used with mod $MOD_2$. To fix, disable or remove one of those mods.
warnings.mixin_apply_java_version: Mod $MOD$ requires Java $REQUIRED_JAVA_VERSION$, but you are using Java $CURRENT_JAVA_VERSION$. To fix, do one of the following: 1) Verify that you have installed or updated Fabulously Optimized properly 2) Find a mod version that is compatible with this Minecraft and Java version 3) Disable or remove the mod until an update makes it compatible 4) Use a Fabulously Optimized version that matches the mod's expected Minecraft and Java version
warnings.mixin_apply_common_end: Need more help? Click OK and follow instructions on the main window.
gui.intel_corrupted_microcode_bad: Your BIOS/UEFI is outdated and you should update it as soon as possible. (Your current microcode version is $MICROCODE_VERSION_CURRENT$, which is lower than the recommended version $MICROCODE_VERSION_FIXED$.)
gui.comment_under_title_pls_report:
If you've added extra mods, they may be outdated or incompatible, which caused this crash.

Need help?
warnings.mixin_apply_missing_class_auto_: Find which mod is missing another mod
gui.privacy.logs_upload_question: Your log will be uploaded to mclo.gs, which removes some identifying information and stores the log for 90 days. Do you accept the $LINK.PRIVACY_POLICY$?
warnings.mixin_config_missing_or_corrupt: Mod $MOD$ is likely broken. To fix, do one of the following: 1) Download the mod again 2) Download a different version of the mod that is compatible with this Minecraft version 3) Disable or remove the mod until an update makes it compatible
gui.privacy.consent_reset_success: Crash Assistant will now ask you before uploading logs.
gui.comment_under_title: 1) Join Fabulously Optimized Discord. 2) Create a new post in #support, describe what you were doing before the crash. 3) Upload and copy each file and paste the links into your support post. 4) Wait for help. We'll tell you if we need more information.
gui.intel_corrupted_msg:
Your Intel CPU has a known defect. Ensure that your BIOS/UEFI is up to date to prevent physical damage and random crashes in the system.

$CURRENT_MICROCODE_TEXT$

Click Learn More to read what you can do, otherwise click OK.
warnings.piracy: You are using an unsupported launcher or offline mode. If you need help with this crash, please try installing a supported launcher or switching to online mode, then repeating the actions that led to the crash. We do not provide support for crashes that happen in offline mode.
gui.privacy.consent_not_given: Crash Assistant already asks you before uploading logs.
warnings.mixin_apply: Mod $MOD$ is likely incompatible with this Minecraft version. To fix, do one of the following: 1) Find a mod version that is compatible with this Minecraft version 2) Disable or remove the mod until an update makes it compatible 3) Use a Fabulously Optimized version that matches the mod's expected Minecraft version
gui.privacy.declined: You chose not to upload your log. You can still share the file manually, or click the button again.
